title.native: 傷口と包帯

description:
Kiritani, the vice-leader of the Kurotorikai yakuza group, is assigned to be the caretaker for Riyo Washizu, the daughter of the Washizugumi organization's grand chairman.

Although Kiritani initially thinks this task will be easy because Riyo appears obedient, Kiritani later discovers that Riyo has a specific fetish called 'Yowaraa.' This fetish makes Riyo feel aroused whenever she sees someone strong or tough become weak and helpless. The story focuses on the romantic comedy relationship between the young yakuza lady and her caretaker.

(Source: MAL News)

title.native: のあ先輩はともだち。

description:
Sometimes, when life is hard, you just need a "friend."

Working at a game company, Rihito Otsuka (23), is a "normal" guy who is a steady presence on and off the job. Noa Saotome (27) is a "hard-core" woman who likes to go all out at everything she does. Two people who usually wouldn't get along become "friends" by chance...? The is the start of an workplace "friendship" comedy that's a little sweet but also a little heavy!

(Source: Shueisha, translated)

title.native: JUNK END

description:
Final movie of the JUNK trilogy.
Set after the story in JUNK HEAD.

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.native: 黑白双龙

description:
Six years after the story first began as a manhua, Mo Lang and Bai Qi’s journey is finally making its way to the screen.

Spinning off as a series from the world of Scissor Seven, this new chapter takes us back to where another adventure began — with the meeting of two boys and the start of a thrilling journey.

title.native: 7人の眠り姫

description:
I want to wake up the princess who was put to sleep by a witch's curse… but there are seven of them! So it seems that I have to kiss...... seven girls! Now the princesses are awake, but the other people in the kingdom are still asleep...... Why? Is there more to breaking the curse than just a kiss or am I still missing something......?

Alec is the third prince of Rudbekia who wants to save the kingdom of Amaryllis and its seven princesses. In a country where only they are awake, they must work together to save everyone from the curse!

(Source: Kodansha, translated)

title.native: るすばん

description:
Set in August 1987, the story follows one day in the life of Tokko as she stays at home in a large house while her family is away.

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.native: モノノ怪 (新プロジェクト)

description:
A new Mononoke project has begun!

The third Medicine Seller "Inui no Tsurugi" has been revealed in a promotional video!

(Source: YouTube Description)

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.native: 竜化粧の忍

description:
The main staff of The Apothecary Diaries are reuniting for an all-new original anime project titled "Jurassic Shadows"

Tokyo, 2029 -
Long believed to have vanished after the asteroid impact that caused their extinction, dinosaurs secretly survived by passing their DNA into humanity through interbreeding. Hidden among ordinary people, they now prey upon humans while living unnoticed within society.
Standing against them is a covert order of ninjas who wield Ryugesho, a special pigment infused with ancient memories. By applying this mysterious pigment, they awaken the powers of dinosaurs within themselves and fight back against the predators threatening humanity.
As the dinosaurs launch their campaign to wipe out humankind, the ninjas rise to stop them.
The battle for the survival of two species begins.

(Source: YouTube Description)

title.english: Star Wars: Visions Presents - The Ninth Jedi
title.romaji: Star Wars: Visions - Kyuuninme no Jedi
title.native: Star Wars：ビジョンズ 九人目のジェダイ

description: The 8-episode limited anime series is part of an all-new Star Wars: Visions Presents banner, which allows filmmakers to tell longer-form Star Wars: Visions stories. Picking up not long after the events of the Visions shorts, in the new series, Lah Kara continues to train in the ways of the Jedi under Margrave Juro amid an epic journey of self-discovery as she and Juro’s small fellowship of Jedi-in-training embark on a quest to save her father.

title.native: Here U Are

description:
Yang Yu is a university upperclassman who's loved by everyone, and Huan Li is a quiet, antisocial new student. The two of them get off on the wrong foot, but despite clashing and repelling one another at times, they are still drawn to each other.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.native: 魔物使いの娘

description:
Veteran adventurer Hakura has overcome countless trials, but his latest fight with a deadly hydra nearly costs him his life. In the nick of time, he is saved by an intriguing young lady named Leen, who, to his surprise, possesses the rare ability to tame any and all monsters! Now indebted to this unscrupulous monstermancer, Hakura decides to join her in her travels, the two of them arguing and bickering every step of the way. What has drawn them together, and what adventures await this unlikely pair?

(Source: J-Novel Club)

title.native: アイカツスターズ！ ～星々のProgress～

description: A movie celebrating the Aikatsu Stars's 10th anniversary.

title.native: 魔女と猟犬

description:
Amelia, the kingdom of dragons with a monopoly on magical power, is once again invading other lands with the ferocious Queen Amelia at its head. Her eyes are set on Campusfellow, the small land of fire and iron, which at this rate will inevitably fall… For the sake of the country’s survival, Lord Bud Grace comes up with a last-resort plan—ally with the one known only as the Witch, the subject of countless terrifying tales. With the assassin Rollo, known as “Black Dog” and versed in every method of killing, at their disposal, they set out to enter an alliance with the first witch, also known as the Mirror Witch…

(Source: Yen Press)

title.native: ソアラと魔物の家

description:
Soara is a young orphan girl who was raised by knights and trained to battle the monsters that constantly attacked their kingdom. But by the time Soara is ready to join the fight herself, peace has been declared and her blade is no longer needed. Searching for a new home and a new purpose, Soara stumbles across Krik the dwarf, leader of the Monster Architects. Suddenly, instead of fighting monsters, Soara finds herself working with Krik to build comfortable homes for them! In the process, will she discover a new home and family for herself?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title.native: マリッジトキシン 第2期

description: The second season of MARRIAGETOXIN.

title.english: The Bugle Call: Song of War
title.native: 戦奏教室

description:
In Arboral Year 1294, the world is dominated by nine massive towers known as the Spires, remnants of an ancient civilization. Filled with lost secrets and powerful knowledge, nations struggle to possess them. Luca is a bugler in a mercenary company who wants nothing more than to leave the battlefield behind and become a true musician, a maestro. But marked as one of the enigmatic Branch-hexed, and gifted with the strange ability to see the sound of his instrument, Luca finds himself drawn reluctantly into a war of epic proportions!

(Source: VIZ Media)

title.romaji: Diamond no Ace act II: Second Season Part 2
title.native: ダイヤのA actⅡ -Second Season- 第2クール

description: The second cour of the second season of Diamond no Ace act II.

title.romaji: Tsue to Tsurugi no Wistoria Season 3
title.native: 杖と剣のウィストリア Season3

description: The third season of Tsue to Tsurugi no Wistoria.

title.native: キルアオ 第2期

description: The second season of Kill Ao.

title.native: 彼女、お借りします 第6期

description: The sixth season of Kanojo, Okarishimasu.

title.native: 終末のワルキューレⅣ

description: The fourth season of Shuumatsu no Valkyrie.

title.native: スノウボールアース 第2期

description: The second season of Snowball Earth.

title.native: すだちの魔王城

description:
After the hero defeated the demon lord, the world is finally at peace... leaving the young Villager of Beginnerville in a bind! Without a demon lord to defeat, people have no need for potions and items...leaving Villager's item shop, The Nest, empty and lifeless. At this rate, Villager might have to close The Nest...! But then suddenly a mysterious girl appears and everything changes...

(Source: K MANGA)

title.native: フールナイト

description:
The earth of the distant future is covered in thick clouds, and the sun no longer shines. Plants wither, and oxygen is thin. To fight extinction, humankind has developed a technology that turns humans into plants, providing a small amount of oxygen. Is this process sustainable? Is it ethical? Toshiro Kamiya must consider these questions as he’s faced with a difficult choice—save his family or save himself.

Kamiya is at the end of his rope. His mother is ill, and his job barely pays for her medication, much less food. With few options left, he considers the life-changing process of transfloration. Ready to give his body up for a payday, Kamiya is about to explore the limits of society’s waning humanity.

(Source: VIZ Media)

title.native: カナン様はあくまでチョロい 第2期

description: The second season of Kanan-sama wa Akumade Choroi.

title.native: あかね噺 第2期

description:
The second season of Akane-banashi.

After graduating from high school and officially becoming an apprentice of Shiguma Arakawa, Akane begins her journey as a professional Rakugoka under the name Akane Arakawa.

(Source: TV Asahi via Anime News Network)

title.native: 地元最高！

description:
This is a story about girls that have never left their hometown, and despite the misfortunes they face, continue to say "My hometown is the best!"

(Source: MangaUpdates)

title.native: ニセモノの錬金術師

description:
In the city-state of Orihalconia, where alchemy and magic are deeply woven into everyday life, a reincarnated man named Paracelsus makes a modest living as an alchemist while concealing his powerful cheat skill.

One day, however, he forms a contract with Nora, a sorceress slave girl, and encounters Coco, an elf who has been deprived of her limbs and all of her senses. From that moment, his life begins to change dramatically.

Determined to save Coco, Paracelsus begins a small act of salvation from his humble workshop. But what starts as a personal mission soon grows into a conflict involving alchemy, sorcery, the cosmos, and even the gods themselves—

A story packed with "everything fantasy has to offer" is about to begin!

(Source: Official Website, translated)

title.native: 恋せよまやかし天使ども

description:
All sugar, no spice, and everything nice… that's the impression the beautiful first-year high schooler and "heartthrob angel" class president Otogi Katsura gives to those around her. In reality, Otogi is brash, assertive, and has no problem calling out a jerk when she sees one—the complete opposite of her soft spoken vice presidential counterpart, the equally beautiful and seemingly perfect Toki Ninomae. One day, when a group of boys try to hit on her at the train station, Otogi doesn't hold back and gives them a piece of her mind—and, to her surprise, Toki enjoys seeing this side of her. Not only that, it turns out the seemingly polite, put-together vice president has a hidden side of his own… and Otogi now finds him more attractive than ever! Now "partners-in-crime," Otogi and Toki agree to keep their hidden sides a secret from the rest of their classmates—but could this shared, dark secret also bring them closer together…?!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

title.native: 電撃デイジー

description:
"No matter what happens, I will protect you."

Teru Kurebayashi, a high school student, starts to receive emails on the cell phone she received from her late brother Souichirou, her only relative.

The emails, sent by a mysterious figure named "Daisy," become her sole support in life following Souichirou's passing. One day, after accidentally breaking a window at school, Teru ends up working for Tasuku Kurosaki, the school custodian.

Kurosaki is sharp-tongued and works her to the bone, but for some reason, he kindly looks out for Teru. And after meeting Kurosaki, Teru's fate starts to change drastically...

(Source: Dengeki Daisy Official Site)

title.native: ドロヘドロ Season 3

description: The third season of Dorohedoro.

title.native: 彼女の友達

description:
For the first time in my life, I have a girlfriend. But her friend tempts me with a body that's so seductive... What would you do if your girlfriend's friend came on to you like this?

(Source: Yanmaga, translated)

title.romaji: Boku no Hero Academia: I am a hero too
title.native: 僕のヒーローアカデミア I am a hero too

description:
Following the broadcast of My Hero Academia Episode 170+1, the series' official website and accounts revealed that a new short anime adapting the "I Am a Hero Too" bonus chapter will tell the story of Eri as a high-schooler when it releases this summer.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.native: カグラバチ

description:
Young Chihiro spends his days training under his famous swordsmith father. One day he hopes to become a great sword-maker himself. The goofy father and the serious son--they thought these days would last forever. But suddenly, tragedy strikes. A dark day soaked in blood. Chihiro and his blade now live only for revenge.

(Source: MANGA Plus)

title.native: THE RIBBON HERO

description:
Princess Sapphire of the lost kingdom. Stripped of everything in her homeland, Silverland, by the calamity known as "Nergal," she arrived in Goldland at the very depths of despair. While carrying the weight of her past, she began to find a glimmer of hope through the kindness of the people. Yet, as if mocking her peaceful daily life, the calamity "Nergal" appears once more. The same despair that reduced her homeland to ashes is now threatening to steal the light from this land as well.

"No more loss for me. No more loss for anyone.”

Wiping way her fears of sorrow, the young girl takes up her sword.
This is the story of a hero who ties her ribbon and resolves to defy fate.

(Source: THE RIBBON HERO Official Site)

Note: This anime is inspired by Osamu Tezuka's manga "Princess Knight”.

title.native: メガネ、時々、ヤンキーくん

description:
Momose has always longed for a peaceful high school life. She wants nothing to do with hoodlums, delinquents, or troublemakers. When she meets Ichikura, an inconspicuous black-haired boy with glasses, he looks like a normal, nice guy. But it turns out that back in junior high he was a nefarious delinquent! He keeps assuring her that he’s changed his ways, but he still has a knack for picking fights! Has Ichikura really turned over a new leaf? And will Momose keep the secret about his rowdy past?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title.romaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
title.native: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記

description:
Satoshi Oosako was a player of the VRRPG "Sword and Sorcery" who defeated the Evil God and died for his troubles. When he awoke again he found himself in a strange unknown forest. Furthermore he possessed his avatar's body and abilities. In other words, he was a cheat. Can a 40-year-old virgin live peacefully in this world?

(Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

title.native: 魔女と傭兵

description:
Nothing in this world is more dangerous than a witch. The epitome of fear and terror, they can summon floods on a whim, conjure balls of fire out of the air, or even destroy entire countries overnight. Incur their wrath, and no one is safe.

At least, that’s what everyone thinks, and it’s the very reason they all want Siasha dead. After yet another violent battle for her life, she teams up with Zig, a mercenary, and they depart for unknown lands to find somewhere she can live in peace. But is the pair any match for the lost magic and vicious monstrosities that lie ahead?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title.romaji: Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu ULT
title.native: 異世界魔王と召喚少女の奴隷魔術ULT

description: The third season of Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu.

title.native: CHERRY AND VIRGIN

description:
Cherry and Virgin is a romantic comedy featuring a 32-year-old "eromanga" author Ryou and a 28-year-old "fujoshi'' Ami. Neither character is great at interacting with members of the opposite gender—Ryou is somewhat of an otaku and defenseless against women, and Ami does not have a good impression of 3D men. After a fateful encounter, the story follows the two as they learn to navigate a sea of interpersonal relationships and come to better understand the bitter and sweet aspects of modern relationships.

(Source: MAL News)

title.native: ザ・ファブル 第2期

description: The second season of The Fable.

title.romaji: Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru: Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta 2nd Season
title.native: 異世界でチート能力を手にした俺は、現実世界をも無双する ～レベルアップは人生を変えた～ 第2期

description: The second season of Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru: Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta.

title.english: Sentenced to Be a Hero Season 2
title.romaji: Yuusha Kei ni Shosu: Choubatsu Yuusha 9004-tai Keimu Kiroku 2nd Season
title.native: 勇者刑に処す 懲罰勇者9004隊刑務記録 第2期

description: The second season of Yuusha Kei ni Shosu: Choubatsu Yuusha 9004-tai Keimu Kiroku.

title.native: 【推しの子】第4期 Final Season

description: The fourth and final season of [Oshi no Ko].

title.romaji: Yuusha Party wo Oidasareta Kiyou Binbou 2nd Season
title.native: 勇者パーティを追い出された器用貧乏 2期

description: The second season of Yuusha Party wo Oidasareta Kiyou Binbou.

title.romaji: Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu 3rd Season
title.native: 僕の心のヤバイやつ 第3期

description: The third season of Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu.

title.native: ブレス

description:
They said Aia was destined to be a model, and Jun was bullied for her freckles. Together, they will take back the power to define themselves in an inspirational fashion manga that asks cutting questions about what it really means to be beautiful—and what it takes to overcome an arbitrary system that seems to respect talent over hard work.

(Source: Kodansha USA)

title.native: 涙雨とセレナーデ

description:
On rainy days, Hina has dreams about her younger self playing with a mysterious boy in a garden she's never seen before—until, by chance, she stumbles upon the place. There's a young man there, Takaaki, who mistakes Hina for his fiancée Hinako. He whisks her back to what he thinks is her home, where Hina's doppelganger is waiting, and Hina realizes this isn't the Tokyo she left behind but Japan in the year 1907! Is this all a dream or something much stranger?

(Source: Kodansha USA)

title.english: The Eternal Fool's Words of Wisdom: A Pawsitively Fantastic Adventure
title.romaji: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
title.native: 悠久の愚者アズリーの、賢者のすゝめ

description:
A couple thousand years of solitude would wear down any young man—that is, anyone except Asley, an eternally youthful and eternally foolish sorcerer. After all, he has man's best friend...er, familiar, to keep him company. When his Level 100 canine companion Pochi demands that he get some fresh air for the first time in two centuries, Asley sets out to reintegrate into society and test his magic mettle. His mission? Dropping several unglamorous titles from his repertoire and restoring his good (okay, decent) name.

A brand-new world and fresh adventures await Asley after his many years of hermitage. Perhaps he'll lend Pochi a hand to place first in the mysterious Familiar Feud. Or maybe he'll lose all vestiges of dignity and turn tail. Whichever comes first! No matter what, Asley has great evil to fight, a big world to save, and even a little growing up to do...that is, if he can endure Pochi's “friendly advice” along the way!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

title.romaji: Guimi Zhi Zhu: Wu Mian Ren Pian
title.native: 诡秘之主 无面人篇​

description: The second season of Guimi Zhi Zhu.

title.romaji: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to
title.native: 君と花火と約束と

description:
The story centers on two Tokyo high schoolers who connect over a painting of fireworks. They trace the painting to the Nagaoka Fireworks Festival in Niigata, one of Japan's three major fireworks festivals, and to a mysterious promise that connects the two to the past.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title.romaji: Starlight Project: Itsuka Dareka ni Todoku ■■■
title.native: スタァライト プロジェクト いつかだれかにとどく■■■

description:
A new animation project for the Revue Starlight series.

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change when more info is announced.

title.native: ホタルの嫁入り

description:
On the surface, Satoko has it all—she’s beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family’s eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously.

(Source: VIZ Media)

title.native: かぐや様は告らせたい 完結編

description:
Theatrical conclusion of Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai, based on an original story written by Aka Akasaka.

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.native: 원룸 조교님

description:
When college student U-Yun meets the quiet and introverted TA Jin-Hyeong, he immediately asks him out, saying he wants to get to know him more. After just three days of dating, Jin-Hyeong moves in with him, and that’s when he starts showing a completely different wild side. All of his BL novel and comic consumption has perverted his perception of the perfect first time with his boyfriend. He’s thought of it all, from doing it in the subway to having U-Yun role-play as a K-pop idol. But as weird as Jin-Hyeong’s ideas are, U-Yun doesn’t entirely hate it...?

(Source: Tappytoon)

title.native: ワンパンマン 第3期第2クール

description: The second cour of the third season of One Punch Man.

title.native: ルリドラゴン

description:
Well, a half dragon. Her mom admits Ruri inherited her draconic traits from her father, who, yes, is actually a dragon. As if dealing with curious classmates wasn’t already challenging enough, Ruri and her dragon genes literally turn up the heat in the middle of a lecture. Her ordinary life is about to be anything but!

(Source: VIZ Media)

title.native: アンデッドアンラック 第2期

description: The second season of Undead Unluck.

title.native: 地雷なんですか？地原さん

description:
The girl sitting next to me at the start of the new semester is the rumored "landmine" girl… but… is Chihara-san really the "landmine" that everyone says she is?

(Source: Ganma!, translated)

title.native: 怪獣８号 完結編

description: Sequel to <i>Kaijuu 8-gou 2nd Season<i>.

title.native: 暁のヨナ (続編)

description: Sequel of Akatsuki no Yona.

title.romaji: Code Geass: Hoshi Oi no Aspar
title.native: コードギアス 星追いのアスパル

description: New Code Geass project announced at the series' 20th Anniversary Event.

title.romaji: Akutou Ikka no Manamusume, Tensei-saki mo Otome Game no Gokudou Reijou deshita.: Saijoukyuu Ranku no Akuyaku-sama, Sono Dekiai wa Fuyou desu!
title.native: 悪党一家の愛娘、転生先も乙女ゲームの極道令嬢でした。～最上級ランクの悪役さま、その溺愛は不要です！～

description:
When the granddaughter of a yakuza boss is reincarnated as Francesca Calvino, the heroine in a mafia dating video game — set in a fantastical world where crime bosses serve the king — she knows what to expect: another ill-fated life without friends. But thanks to her upbringing, she’s already hatched a plan. By expertly navigating the game’s main story, Francesca will leave the world of organized crime behind for good!

First on her agenda: break off her engagement to the notorious Leonardo Aldini, the young head of the Aldini family and major villain of the game. But after breezing through her kidnapping without a male lead in sight, Francesca proves herself to be a little too good at taking Leonardo on. Not only does he still wish to marry, but he won’t leave her alone.

How is Francesca supposed to live a normal life while being pursued by an insolent crime lord?

(Source: TOKYOPOP)

title.romaji: Chiikawa: Ningyo no Shima no Himitsu
title.native: 映画ちいかわ 人魚の島のひみつ

description:
Based on a series of Chiikawa comics posted on X by Nagano from March to November 2023, known as the "Siren Arc".

One day, while Chiikawa and Hachiware were relaxing in the square, Usagi suddenly appeared with a flyer stuck to its face. When Hachiware checked the flyer, it was an invitation reading “Special Invitation to a Special Island.”

Lured by promises like “Get 100x rewards for simple island quests!” and “Limited-edition island ramen, exclusive sweets—sweet and spicy treats all practically free!”, Chiikawa and the others decided to go on the island retreat. Boarding the ship alongside Rakko, who was suspicious of the flyer's contents, the group landed on the island... only to find something waiting for them there...!?

(Source: Official Site, translated)

title.romaji: Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru
title.native: 魔術を極めて旅に出た転生エルフ、持て余した寿命で生ける伝説となる

description:
Minoru Kido, age 30, cause of death: traffic accident. As a Japanese, I died without leaving any evidence of my life. At the time of my death, I was thinking, "Next time, I want to live a long life and leave behind some proof of my life," when I was reincarnated as an elf with a life span of 1,000 years! That's why I made a vow. I vowed that this time I would spend my whole life living in a way that would leave a mark on my life.

At the age of 20, I was able to use all of the healing magic that elves were originally equipped with at will. By the age of 30, I had mastered all attribute magic, and by the age of 100, I had deciphered all the ancient magic formulas. For the remaining 900 years of my life, all I have to do is run out of the Elven forest and become a warrior.

One day, I'll be missed by a fledgling adventurer who will eventually be called a hero. Sometimes, a country is founded in my name. Sometimes, I was called the founder of magic and became an object of worship. This is the story of a reincarnated elf who roars his name into history as a living legend.

(Source: Kakuyomu, translated)

title.native: 我々は宇宙人

description:
One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart. Spanning more than thirty years, this gentle, contemplative story invites the audience to reflect on the meaning of life through the paths their lives take.

(Source: NOTHING NEW)

title.romaji: Disney Twisted-Wonderland: THE ANIMATION - Season 2: EPISODE of SAVANACLAW
title.native: ディズニー ツイステッドワンダーランド ザ アニメーション シーズン2「エピソード オブ サバナクロー」

description: The second season of Disney Twisted-Wonderland: THE ANIMATION.

title.native: てつりょー！meet with 鉄道むすめ

description:
Misaki has often felt the urge to break free from everyday life and set out on a journey somewhere far away. Even though she doesn’t yet know what she wants to become, she longs to find something she can truly be passionate about.

At the start of a new chapter on a lively campus, she meets the members of the Railway Travel Research Club—known as the “Tetsuryo Club.” As her world unfolds along the railway lines, Misaki’s heart begins to race with excitement!

As TETSUDOU MUSUME celebrates its 20th anniversary, the Tetsuryo Club sets off on a journey through the world where the Railway Girls work, in search of moments of wonder.

(Source: Pony Canyon Anime)

title.native: 请叫我诡差大人

description:
A perpetual night of catastrophe, terror descends, and strange phenomena abound! A young man, Wang Ye, is inexplicably chosen by the "Mysterious Post Office" to serve as a "ghost messenger," awakening his special powers and repeatedly embroiling himself in dangerous and paranormal phenomena. Witness how Wang Ye pushes the envelope, dispelling the mysteries and igniting the flames of humanity's survival amidst the terrifying darkness.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

title.native: 薬屋のひとりごと 第3期

description:
The third season of Kusuriya no Hitorigoto.

In the aftermath of the Shi Clan’s rebellion, things have finally settled down, and Maomao has returned to her old life as a pharmacist in the pleasure district.

One day, triggered by a breakfast served at the Verdigris House, Maomao senses an anomaly and begins investigating its true nature.

Meanwhile, Jinshi, who has revealed his true identity as the Imperial brother and begun to face his heavy responsibilities, is deeply troubled by the final message left by Loulan: a warning of an impending "disaster that will strike the nation."

To make matters worse, rumors of a mysterious shrine maiden who deceives the people begin to spread, casting a dark shadow over the country of Li once again.

From the depths of the inner court to the city streets, and across foreign borders—the world grows wider, and the stakes even higher for Maomao and Jinshi.

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

title.romaji: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!
title.native: 生徒会にも穴はある！

description:
Mizunoe Ume just wanted to avoid repeating a grade when he joined the student council. After all, it seemed like an easy fix to his current academic problems. But then, he met his fellow council members. Each of them is eccentric in their own way-one's an airhead, another's scary, one's secretly a pervert, but all in all, they're just really weird! Yet somehow, they're also oddly cute and endearing. Which means Mizunoe is stuck with them and all the chaos they bring to the table.

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title.native: ブレイド＆バスタード

description:
Deep in the unexplored reaches of the dungeon, a corpse is discovered—one that shouldn’t exist. After Iarumas is resurrected, his memories of life before death are gone, and he spends his days delving into the dungeon to retrieve the bodies of dead adventurers. Can they be revived as well? Or will God reduce them to piles of ash on the altar? Either way, Iarumas collects his finder’s fee. And though his skills earn him some grudging respect, he’s also scorned for this cold, utilitarian attitude. The living keep their distance—Iarumas consorts primarily with the dead. That is, until he meets Garbage, a feral young swordswoman who’s the sole survivor of a massacred party. With Garbage by his side, Iarumas ventures deeper, scouring the dungeon for clues to his past, avoiding monsters, traps, and the inevitability of a permanent ashen demise.

(Source: J-Novel Club)

title.romaji: Zenchiteki na Dokusha no Shiten kara
title.native: 全知的な読者の視点から

description:
Dokja was an average office worker whose sole interest was reading his favorite web novel 'Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse.' But when the novel suddenly becomes reality, he is the only person who knows how the world will end. Armed with this realization, Dokja uses his understanding to change the course of the story, and the world, as he knows it.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.native: KILLTUBE

description:
KILLTUBE is a animated project that exudes the theme "Edopunk". It depicts Tokyo's Shibuya and Shinjuku districts in a parallel world, where the Edo shogunate has closed off Japan and carried on for over four centuries into 2026. In this isolated, stratified society, the only way to change one's standing in life is through participating in live-streamed mortal combat.

The battle entertainment story unfolds when an unlikely trio from the lowest depths of society withstand ridicule and aim for the top. As they win over the general public, they discover the hidden truth behind the KILLTUBE system.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.native: BEAT&MOTION

description:
BEAT & MOTION is a coming-of-age story about music, animation, and the coming together of creative dreams between Tatsuhiko, a young man who has lost sight of his dream, and Nico, an indie musician who refuses to give up on hers. Though they clash, the two unlock each other’s talent and begin moving toward a creative vision neither could reach alone.

(Source: Netflix)

title.native: 이계 검왕 생존기

description:
After being recently discharged from military service and just drifting through life, Hanbin Ryu is suddenly transported to another world. However, his “guide line,” the system bestowed upon him to help with his survival and growth, was filled with errors, causing him to be stuck in the tutorial stage for over 20 years. When he is finally released from this personal hell, he finds everyone has turned against otherworlders like him. Just how will this low-level, super-tutorial newbie survive?

(Source: Tapas)

title.native: 魔法少女育成計画 restart

description:
A stage reading in the Magical Girl Raising Project franchise announced that an anime adaptation of Asari Endou's Magical Girl Raising Project Restart light novel volumes has been green-lit. Hiroyuki Hashimoto reported on Twitter that he will return from the first Magical Girl Raising Project anime as the director. The franchise's Twitter account also teased that various initiatives are in the works for "Project restart."

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.native: ORBITAL ERA

description:
Orbital Era is set in the near-future on a space colony under construction. The film features a coming-of-age action-adventure story following the lives of young boys surviving in this peculiar environment and society as they are tossed around by fate. "The reality found in mankind's future" will be depicted through their perspective.

The story will take place over four seasons in the space colony. The characters relationships will unfold over these seasons. Otomo noted that the film is set in the future, but instead of being rooted in science fiction, the story will skew more toward fantasy.

(Source Anime News Network)

description: The series centers on Kō Ōtori, a normal high school student who experiences a repeating dream of being eaten by a beast from inside himself. When Kō meets Reiichi Kuki, the elite student who rules his school, the encounter awakens hidden powers inside him.

title.native: メガゾーン23 XI

description:
The story is set aboard the Megazone 11, a different space colony ship fleet from the Megazone 23 in the 1985 original video anime. Megazone 11's master ships are designed as realistic simulations of Earth cities such as Tokyo, and there is also a satellite ship that is designed to resemble a smaller Japanese provincial city around the year 2020. The protagonist Sakura is an ordinary second-year middle school student who lives aboard that satellite ship. She leads a secret life as part of a singing duo with Eve, a friend she made online. On a master ship, a resistance movement flares up. To achieve independence, they must take control of Tiamat, the system that controls the fleet, but the key to the system was lost in battle 80 years ago. With rumors of its reappearance surfacing, both the resistance and the government are seeking the key. One day, while visiting Akihabara on the Tokyo ship to meet Eve, Sakura is embroiled in the middle of a terrorist attack at the train station. As Eve remotely guides Sakura to safety, Sakura comes across Garland XI, a transforming motorcycle robot mecha that Eve tells her to use.

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.native: メガゾーン23SIN

description: Remake of Megazone 23

title.romaji: Boku wa Robot Goshi no Kimi ni Koi wo Suru
title.native: 僕はロボットごしの君に恋をする

description:
In the year 2060, Tokyo's third Olympics is close at hand. While a secret project using robots moves forward, notice of a terrorist threat arrives. 28-year-old Takeru is an operator at the AI institute that protects the public via remote controlled robots. Takeru operates T-004, a humanoid robot that is so convincing, most can't tell that it's a robot. Takeru has long pined for his youthful first crush, Saki who is also the sister of his coworker Youichirou. However, Saki encounters T-004 and finds herself growing attracted to the robot, who she believes is a man named "Tsubasa."

(Source: Anime News Network)
